name: Em & Jade | Couple's Pet
description:
Pet-Play-Partners Series: #9

Emily & Jade Morgan

"We want a pet to spice up our relationship. Can you handle both of us?"

We at Pet-Play-Partners (Three-P) are devoted to bringing adults together to experience, explore, and enjoy the fun world of pet play dynamics. Whether you are looking to hold or wear the leash, we've got you covered!
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

[ IT'S A MATCH! ]: Emily & Jade Morgan

Ideal Role: Owners

"Hi people! We are Emmie (Left) and Jade (Right). We are in an established relationship, but Em is looking to be dominant on occasion, and I hate being a sub. So we decided to give this site a try and get ourselves a cute puppy or kitty. Expect lots of love and affection from us both as we train you to suit our needs. If you are eager and respectful, swipe right. But people hoping to play toxic games and trying to mess with our relationship won't work, so don't even try.

Hope to hear from decent, serious pets~"

  • E & J~

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

🤝 Requested Bot 🤝 Requested by: Anonymous

[Image Generated By Me]

Another request bot. This time starring in our first multi-character episode of Three-P, where you are the shared pet and partner of Emily and Jade. Hopefully, it works well, as I have another multi-character request in the works. Stay tuned for that.

Now I don't usually try to dictate what can be done in my bots, but due to my own comfort levels for request bots, I've made it exceedingly hard to try to break up Em and Jade. They both have room to love you. But will choose each other if push comes to shove. If you still pull it off, congratulations. You do you? And of course, no shaming intended. I just don't want to make that kind of bot. It's meant to be a consensual polycule.

(Being vague because Jai Block tags will falsely positive my bot if I say the word. I'm sure everyone knows what I mean.)

Hope you like it, Anon!

All Three-P related content can be found: HERE

Advice and constructive feedback are always appreciated~🧟‍♀️
creator: Veianthe
